{{Quote|The battle... did not go well for us that day.|K'Kruhk|<ref name="Jedi: Mace Windu" />}}
The '''Battle of Teyr''' was a battle fought on [[Teyr/Legends|Teyr]] during the early stages of the [[Clone Wars/Legends|Clone Wars]].

==Background==
When the call came for [[Jedi Knight/Legends|Jedi Knights]] and [[Jedi Master/Legends|Masters]] to serve as Generals in the [[Grand Army of the Republic/Legends|Grand Army of the Republic]], Master [[K'Kruhk]] obeyed, taking command of the [[416th Star Corps]]. On Teyr, their target was a [[Lucrehulk-class battleship/Legends|Trade Federation battleship]] that had made a hard landing, and was serving as a [[Confederacy of Independent Systems/Legends|Separatist]] bunker.

==The battle==
{{Quote|We can achieve the objective, General. We need to press on.|[[Clone trooper/Legends|Clone trooper]] to General [[K'Kruhk]] at the Battle of Teyr|<ref name="Jedi: Mace Windu" />}}
[[File:KKruhkTeyr.jpg|thumb|left|Jedi Master K'Kruhk leads his troops into battle.]]
K'Kruhk led his forces through the [[Great Canyon (Teyr)|Great Canyon]], only to have many of his men shredded to pieces by [[OG-9 homing spider droid/Legends|spider droids]]. K'Kruhk's battalion made it to the lip of the canyon, and made a final assault. K'Kruhk led his troops from the front, but knew the Separatists had the advantage in numbers. He ordered his clones to fall back, but they assured him they could achieve victory. K'Kruhk was unprepared to send so many men to their deaths, though the clones knew this is what they had been bred for; to fight and die in battle. With a weary heart, K'Kruhk pressed the attack, and though the battleship was destroyed, only the [[Jedi/Legends|Jedi]] General, [[CRC-09/571]], and several [[Clone trooper/Legends|clone troopers]] appeared to have survived the battle.

==Aftermath==
K'Kruhk was shell-shocked by his ordeal, and fled Teyr without informing the [[Jedi Council/Legends|Jedi Council]] of his survival. Believing that the war was destroying the very foundations of the [[Jedi Code/Legends|Jedi Code]], he came to join the Jedi dissidents on [[Ruul (moon)|Ruul]].
